title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Frontend Developer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
